mapper.select: /** CmmtEntDao.select */ select member_id ,cmpny_type_cd ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('CMPNY_TYPE',cmpny_type_cd) ,indust_realm_cd ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('INDUST_REALM',indust_realm_cd) ,fond_day ,emply_cnt ,resdng_nmpr ,empmn_prearnge_nmpr ,induty ,main_induty ,main_tchnlgy_product ,zip ,adres ,enc_fxnum ,enc_reprsnt_telno ,enc_ceo_telno ,enc_ceo_email ,new_fntn_plan_cd ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('NEW_FNTN_PLAN',new_fntn_plan_cd) ,fond_plan_cd ,fn_cmm_get_code_nm('FOND_PLAN',fond_plan_cd) ,prvyy_salamt ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from cmmt_ent where member_id = #{memeberId}
